props.name: accept
props.description: Accepted file types (the input's `accept` attribute), e.g. "image/*".

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow selecting/dropping more than one file.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name (the underlying file input).

props.name: caption
props.description: Optional grey caption under the text (e.g. accepted formats / max size).
